messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-486 — Auto-reap orphaned SwarmForge agent processes left by dry-runs, with a BL-367-safe never-touch-a-live-agent predicate
What it solves: ORIGIN — operator-relayed human directive, drained from the backlog root. The operator gathered the
facts and proposed a safe heuristic but explicitly left FINAL DESIGN to the specifier. This is
self-improvement the swarm should own: onboarding / second-swarm bring-up dry-runs (FES) run from a
temp…
Approval context: HIGH-RISK reaper of live `claude` processes — needs human sign-off before it lands. FIRM (my design, not open): (a) the reaper NEVER pattern-kills — enumeration only surfaces candidates, the kill is per-pid through the pure predicate; (b) the live control socket's tmux window set is the decapitatio…
BL-486 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-486" (or "reject BL-486 <reason>") to act.
